core_mechanism: nonparametric two-sample hypothesis testing applied to predefined subsets of components to attribute a detected discontinuity to particular parts, with formal Type I error control under conditioning on the prior detection event (post-selection inference)
brief_reason: The abstract proposes post hoc two-sample (nonparametric) testing procedures, run after a change has been located, to decide which of two predefined coordinate blocks carries the change, with theoretical guarantees for Type I error control.
